forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KS36KNHH9BPC82MFMGTY3T5J
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '9880'
+project: command-service
+title: 'Extend `kanban` MCP tool: clipboard (cut/copy/paste) + archive/unarchive'
+---
+## What
+
+Add the operations the entity-commands plugin needs that the existing `kanban` MCP tool does not yet expose: clipboard (cut/copy/paste via `PasteMatrix`) and `archive`/`unarchive`. The `kanban` tool already covers add/update/delete/get for task/column/tag/project/actor/attachment, move/complete/tag/untag/assign task ‚Äî verified in `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/kanban/mod.rs`. These are the gaps.
+
+Files:
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/kanban/mod.rs` ‚Äî add operations:
+  - `archive task`, `unarchive task` (entity.archive/unarchive map to these; today archive lives in `EntityContext` but is not exposed as a kanban op ‚Äî confirm and wire it)
+  - `cut`, `copy`, `paste` (clipboard) ‚Äî wraps the `PasteMatrix` (`Arc<PasteMatrix>`, today in `swissarmyhammer-kanban`, reached via `ctx.kanban.paste_matrix()`). These operate on whatever entity is targeted, mirroring today's `clipboard_commands.rs`.
+- Update the kanban tool's operation set + `description.md` so the new ops appear in `tools/list` and `_meta`.
+
+Design note (from the user): clipboard cut/copy/paste and archive are **entity-cross-cutting** ‚Äî they work on any entity type, same as undo/redo. They belong on the `kanban` tool (which already owns generic entity CRUD) rather than a separate `clipboard` server, keeping the consolidated-server design. Paste must preserve the drag-vs-paste distinction (memory: drag-vs-paste) ‚Äî external paste creates via PasteMatrix; it is not the internal-drag property mutation.
+
+Archive/unarchive and paste are undoable ‚Äî they write through the unified changelog so `app.undo` reverts them.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `kanban` tool exposes `archive task`, `unarchive task`, `cut`, `copy`, `paste`
+- [ ] `tools/list` + `_meta` reflect the new operations
+- [ ] `cut`/`copy`/`paste` round-trip against the real `PasteMatrix`; paste creates the duplicate entity in the store
+- [ ] `archive task`/`unarchive task` move the task in/out of the archive as today's `EntityContext` does
+- [ ] New ops are captured by the unified changelog (undoable)
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/tests/integration/kanban_clipboard_archive_e2e.rs` ‚Äî real kanban store; copy a task ‚Üí paste ‚Üí assert duplicate; cut ‚Üí paste ‚Üí assert moved; archive ‚Üí assert in archive; unarchive ‚Üí assert restored
+- [ ] Undo integration: paste a task; `app.undo`; assert the paste reverted
+- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-tools` passes
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`
+
+Prerequisite for: entity-commands plugin. Depends on the operation-struct foundation.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -5,36 +5,42 @@
 - 01KS5F5ZNA0621X8KM2NPERXNV
 position_column: todo
 position_ordinal: '9880'
-project: command-backends
-title: 'Extend `kanban` MCP tool: clipboard (cut/copy/paste) + archive/unarchive'
+project: entity-service
+title: '`entity` MCP server: generic CRUD + archive + clipboard + search'
 ---
 ## What

-Add the operations the entity-commands plugin needs that the existing `kanban` MCP tool does not yet expose: clipboard (cut/copy/paste via `PasteMatrix`) and `archive`/`unarchive`. The `kanban` tool already covers add/update/delete/get for task/column/tag/project/actor/attachment, move/complete/tag/untag/assign task ‚Äî verified in `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/kanban/mod.rs`. These are the gaps.
+Build the `entity` MCP server ‚Äî the generic, type-agnostic entity capability the UI and the cross-cutting `entity.*` commands need. Today this lives in-process in `EntityContext`/`EntityCache`/`EntityTypeStore` (`swissarmyhammer-entity`), the `PasteMatrix` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban`), and `EntitySearchIndex` (`swissarmyhammer-entity-search`), reached via Tauri commands (`get_entity`) and `ctx.require_extension` ‚Äî there is no MCP surface. This server exposes all of it.

-Files:
-- `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/kanban/mod.rs` ‚Äî add operations:
-  - `archive task`, `unarchive task` (entity.archive/unarchive map to these; today archive lives in `EntityContext` but is not exposed as a kanban op ‚Äî confirm and wire it)
-  - `cut`, `copy`, `paste` (clipboard) ‚Äî wraps the `PasteMatrix` (`Arc<PasteMatrix>`, today in `swissarmyhammer-kanban`, reached via `ctx.kanban.paste_matrix()`). These operate on whatever entity is targeted, mirroring today's `clipboard_commands.rs`.
-- Update the kanban tool's operation set + `description.md` so the new ops appear in `tools/list` and `_meta`.
+Design boundary (per the user): **generic entity capability = `entity` service; kanban-domain = `kanban` service.** The `entity` server owns operations that work on ANY entity type; the existing `kanban` tool keeps board lifecycle, task positioning (`move task`), `next/complete task`, `assign`, `tag/untag`. (Search is an entity capability ‚Äî it lives here, not as a separate `search` server.)

-Design note (from the user): clipboard cut/copy/paste and archive are **entity-cross-cutting** ‚Äî they work on any entity type, same as undo/redo. They belong on the `kanban` tool (which already owns generic entity CRUD) rather than a separate `clipboard` server, keeping the consolidated-server design. Paste must preserve the drag-vs-paste distinction (memory: drag-vs-paste) ‚Äî external paste creates via PasteMatrix; it is not the internal-drag property mutation.
+Files:
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity/src/server.rs` (or a thin `swissarmyhammer-entity-mcp` crate) ‚Äî `EntityServer` over `Arc<EntityContext>` + the shared `Arc<StoreContext>` + `EntitySearchIndex`
+- `operations.rs` ‚Äî `#[operation]` structs (all take an entity-type param where relevant):
+  - **read**: `GetEntity { type, id }`, `ListEntities { type, filter? }` (replaces the frontend `get_entity` Tauri command + board-load)
+  - **write**: `AddEntity { type, fields }`, `UpdateField { type, id, field, value }`, `DeleteEntity { type, id }`
+  - **archive**: `ArchiveEntity { type, id }`, `UnarchiveEntity { type, id }`
+  - **clipboard**: `Cut`, `Copy`, `Paste` (wraps `PasteMatrix`; preserves the drag-vs-paste distinction ‚Äî external paste creates via PasteMatrix)
+  - **search**: `Search { query, type? }` (wraps `EntitySearchIndex`)
+- `service.rs` ‚Äî holds the contexts; bootstrap `host.expose_rust_module("entity", EntityServer::new(...))`

-Archive/unarchive and paste are undoable ‚Äî they write through the unified changelog so `app.undo` reverts them.
+Writes go through `EntityContext`, which already pushes onto the shared `StoreContext` (undoable) and broadcasts `EntityEvent`s ‚Äî so undo + the notification surface work for free. Share the SAME `Arc<StoreContext>` as `kanban`/`views`/`store` (substrate invariant).

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `kanban` tool exposes `archive task`, `unarchive task`, `cut`, `copy`, `paste`
-- [ ] `tools/list` + `_meta` reflect the new operations
-- [ ] `cut`/`copy`/`paste` round-trip against the real `PasteMatrix`; paste creates the duplicate entity in the store
-- [ ] `archive task`/`unarchive task` move the task in/out of the archive as today's `EntityContext` does
-- [ ] New ops are captured by the unified changelog (undoable)
+- [ ] `entity` registered as an in-process server over `EntityContext` + shared `StoreContext` + `EntitySearchIndex`
+- [ ] Generic read (`GetEntity`/`ListEntities`) returns any entity type ‚Äî replaces the `get_entity` Tauri command
+- [ ] Generic write/archive/clipboard work on any entity type; writes are undoable via the shared stack and emit entity events
+- [ ] `Search` returns hits from `EntitySearchIndex`
+- [ ] No duplicate entity state ‚Äî wraps the existing contexts
+- [ ] `_meta` operations tree complete

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/tests/integration/kanban_clipboard_archive_e2e.rs` ‚Äî real kanban store; copy a task ‚Üí paste ‚Üí assert duplicate; cut ‚Üí paste ‚Üí assert moved; archive ‚Üí assert in archive; unarchive ‚Üí assert restored
-- [ ] Undo integration: paste a task; `app.undo`; assert the paste reverted
-- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-tools` passes
+- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity/tests/integration/entity_server_e2e.rs` ‚Äî add ‚Üí get ‚Üí update_field ‚Üí delete round-trip across two entity types; archive/unarchive; clipboard copy‚Üípaste creates a duplicate; `Search` finds an entity by text
+- [ ] Undo integration: update_field via `entity`; `store.undo`; assert reverted (proves shared stack)
+- [ ] `_meta` snapshot
+- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-entity` (and `-p swissarmyhammer-entity-search` if split) passes

 ## Workflow
-- Use `/tdd`
+- Use `/tdd` ‚Äî write the CRUD round-trip + search test first.

-Prerequisite for: entity-commands plugin. Depends on the operation-struct foundation.
\ No newline at end of file
+Prerequisite for: entity-commands plugin, the frontend's generic reads + search UI. Depends on store-service substrate. The `kanban` service needs NO clipboard/archive changes now ‚Äî those live here.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -10,19 +10,25 @@
 ---
 ## What

-Build the `entity` MCP server ‚Äî the generic, type-agnostic entity capability the UI and the cross-cutting `entity.*` commands need. Today this lives in-process in `EntityContext`/`EntityCache`/`EntityTypeStore` (`swissarmyhammer-entity`), the `PasteMatrix` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban`), and `EntitySearchIndex` (`swissarmyhammer-entity-search`), reached via Tauri commands (`get_entity`) and `ctx.require_extension` ‚Äî there is no MCP surface. This server exposes all of it.
+Build the `entity` MCP server ‚Äî the generic, type-agnostic MCP face over the entity **kernel** (`EntityContext`/`EntityCache`/`EntityTypeStore` in `swissarmyhammer-entity`), plus `PasteMatrix` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban`) and `EntitySearchIndex` (`swissarmyhammer-entity-search`). Today this state is reached via Tauri commands (`get_entity`) and `ctx.require_extension` ‚Äî no MCP surface. This server exposes it generically.
+
+### Kernel + facades (per the user): kanban keeps ALL its operations
+
+`EntityContext` is the **kernel** (one CRUD implementation). Two MCP faces sit over it:
+- **`entity`** (this task) ‚Äî generic, type-agnostic: get/list/add/update/delete + archive/unarchive + clipboard + search for ANY type. For cross-cutting `entity.*` commands, the frontend's generic reads, and the search UI.
+- **`kanban`** (exists, unchanged surface) ‚Äî domain facade: `add task`, `add project`, `update column`, `get tag`, `move task`, `next/complete task`, `assign`, `tag/untag`, board lifecycle. **kanban does NOT lose operations** ‚Äî its typed/domain ops stay and pass through to the entity kernel internally.

-Design boundary (per the user): **generic entity capability = `entity` service; kanban-domain = `kanban` service.** The `entity` server owns operations that work on ANY entity type; the existing `kanban` tool keeps board lifecycle, task positioning (`move task`), `next/complete task`, `assign`, `tag/untag`. (Search is an entity capability ‚Äî it lives here, not as a separate `search` server.)
+So this is additive: a new generic face over the shared kernel, not a removal from kanban. Search is an entity capability ‚Äî it lives here, not as a separate `search` server.

 Files:
-- `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity/src/server.rs` (or a thin `swissarmyhammer-entity-mcp` crate) ‚Äî `EntityServer` over `Arc<EntityContext>` + the shared `Arc<StoreContext>` + `EntitySearchIndex`
-- `operations.rs` ‚Äî `#[operation]` structs (all take an entity-type param where relevant):
-  - **read**: `GetEntity { type, id }`, `ListEntities { type, filter? }` (replaces the frontend `get_entity` Tauri command + board-load)
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity/src/server.rs` (or a thin `swissarmyhammer-entity-mcp` crate) ‚Äî `EntityServer` over `Arc<EntityContext>` + shared `Arc<StoreContext>` + `EntitySearchIndex`
+- `operations.rs` ‚Äî `#[operation]` structs (entity-type param where relevant):
+  - **read**: `GetEntity { type, id }`, `ListEntities { type, filter? }` (replaces the `get_entity` Tauri command + board-load)
   - **write**: `AddEntity { type, fields }`, `UpdateField { type, id, field, value }`, `DeleteEntity { type, id }`
-  - **archive**: `ArchiveEntity { type, id }`, `UnarchiveEntity { type, id }`
-  - **clipboard**: `Cut`, `Copy`, `Paste` (wraps `PasteMatrix`; preserves the drag-vs-paste distinction ‚Äî external paste creates via PasteMatrix)
+  - **archive**: `ArchiveEntity`, `UnarchiveEntity`
+  - **clipboard**: `Cut`, `Copy`, `Paste` (wraps `PasteMatrix`; preserves drag-vs-paste)
   - **search**: `Search { query, type? }` (wraps `EntitySearchIndex`)
-- `service.rs` ‚Äî holds the contexts; bootstrap `host.expose_rust_module("entity", EntityServer::new(...))`
+- `service.rs` ‚Äî bootstrap `host.expose_rust_module("entity", EntityServer::new(...))`

 Writes go through `EntityContext`, which already pushes onto the shared `StoreContext` (undoable) and broadcasts `EntityEvent`s ‚Äî so undo + the notification surface work for free. Share the SAME `Arc<StoreContext>` as `kanban`/`views`/`store` (substrate invariant).

@@ -29,18 +35,18 @@
 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] `entity` registered as an in-process server over `EntityContext` + shared `StoreContext` + `EntitySearchIndex`
 - [ ] Generic read (`GetEntity`/`ListEntities`) returns any entity type ‚Äî replaces the `get_entity` Tauri command
-- [ ] Generic write/archive/clipboard work on any entity type; writes are undoable via the shared stack and emit entity events
+- [ ] Generic write/archive/clipboard work on any type; writes undoable via the shared stack; emit entity events
 - [ ] `Search` returns hits from `EntitySearchIndex`
-- [ ] No duplicate entity state ‚Äî wraps the existing contexts
+- [ ] `kanban`'s operation surface is UNCHANGED ‚Äî both faces resolve through the one `EntityContext` kernel (no duplicate CRUD, no lost kanban ops)
 - [ ] `_meta` operations tree complete

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity/tests/integration/entity_server_e2e.rs` ‚Äî add ‚Üí get ‚Üí update_field ‚Üí delete round-trip across two entity types; archive/unarchive; clipboard copy‚Üípaste creates a duplicate; `Search` finds an entity by text
-- [ ] Undo integration: update_field via `entity`; `store.undo`; assert reverted (proves shared stack)
-- [ ] `_meta` snapshot
-- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-entity` (and `-p swissarmyhammer-entity-search` if split) passes

 ## What

-Build the `entity` MCP server ‚Äî the generic, type-agnostic MCP face over the entity **kernel** (`EntityContext`/`EntityCache`/`EntityTypeStore` in `swissarmyhammer-entity`), plus `PasteMatrix` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban`) and `EntitySearchIndex` (`swissarmyhammer-entity-search`). Today this state is reached via Tauri commands (`get_entity`) and `ctx.require_extension` ‚Äî no MCP surface. This server exposes it generically.
-
-### Kernel + facades (per the user): kanban keeps ALL its operations
+Build the `entity` MCP server ‚Äî the generic, type-agnostic entity capability the UI and the cross-cutting `entity.*` commands need. Today this lives in-process in `EntityContext`/`EntityCache`/`EntityTypeStore` (`swissarmyhammer-entity`), the `PasteMatrix` (`swissarmyhammer-kanban`), and `EntitySearchIndex` (`swissarmyhammer-entity-search`), reached via Tauri commands (`get_entity`) and `ctx.require_extension` ‚Äî there is no MCP surface. This server exposes all of it.

-`EntityContext` is the **kernel** (one CRUD implementation). Two MCP faces sit over it:
-- **`entity`** (this task) ‚Äî generic, type-agnostic: get/list/add/update/delete + archive/unarchive + clipboard + search for ANY type. For cross-cutting `entity.*` commands, the frontend's generic reads, and the search UI.
-- **`kanban`** (exists, unchanged surface) ‚Äî domain facade: `add task`, `add project`, `update column`, `get tag`, `move task`, `next/complete task`, `assign`, `tag/untag`, board lifecycle. **kanban does NOT lose operations** ‚Äî its typed/domain ops stay and pass through to the entity kernel internally.
-
-So this is additive: a new generic face over the shared kernel, not a removal from kanban. Search is an entity capability ‚Äî it lives here, not as a separate `search` server.
+Design boundary (per the user): **generic entity capability = `entity` service; kanban-domain = `kanban` service.** The `entity` server owns operations that work on ANY entity type; the existing `kanban` tool keeps board lifecycle, task positioning (`move task`), `next/complete task`, `assign`, `tag/untag`. (Search is an entity capability ‚Äî it lives here, not as a separate `search` server.)

-`EntityContext` is the **kernel** (one CRUD implementation), and both faces already sit over it today (verified: `KanbanContext` holds `Arc<EntityContext>` at `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/context.rs:35` and delegates generic entity I/O to it at `context.rs:368`):
-- **`entity`** (this task, NEW) ‚Äî generic, type-agnostic: get/list/add/update/delete + archive/unarchive for ANY type. For cross-cutting `entity.*` commands and the frontend's generic reads.
-- **`kanban`** (EXISTS) ‚Äî domain face: `add task`, `add project`, `update column`, `get tag`, `move task`, `next/complete task`, `assign`, `tag/untag`, board lifecycle. Its operation surface is generated from `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/.../schema.rs::kanban_operations()` (single source).
+`EntityContext` is the **kernel** (one CRUD implementation), and both faces already sit over it today:
+- **`entity`** (this task, NEW) ‚Äî generic, type-agnostic: get/list/add/update/delete + archive/unarchive + clipboard + search for ANY type. For cross-cutting `entity.*` commands, the frontend's generic reads, and the search UI.
+- **`kanban`** (EXISTS) ‚Äî domain face: `add task`, `add project`, `update column`, `get tag`, `move task`, `next/complete task`, `assign`, `tag/untag`, board lifecycle.

 **Hard constraint (per the user): this work does NOT change kanban's operations.** No operation is added to or removed from the `kanban` tool. The `entity` server is purely additive. kanban already reaches `EntityContext` today, so it needs no change to share the kernel. Refactoring kanban's internals to delegate to the kernel more explicitly is **optional and out of scope right now** ‚Äî implementation may change later; the operation surface may not.

 Files:
-- `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity/src/server.rs` (or a thin `swissarmyhammer-entity-mcp` crate) ‚Äî `EntityServer` over `Arc<EntityContext>` + shared `Arc<StoreContext>`
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-entity/src/server.rs` (or a thin `swissarmyhammer-entity-mcp` crate) ‚Äî `EntityServer` over `Arc<EntityContext>` + shared `Arc<StoreContext>` + `EntitySearchIndex`
 - `operations.rs` ‚Äî `#[operation]` structs (entity-type param where relevant):
   - **read**: `GetEntity { type, id }`, `ListEntities { type, filter? }` (replaces the `get_entity` Tauri command + board-load)
   - **write**: `AddEntity { type, fields }`, `UpdateField { type, id, field, value }`, `DeleteEntity { type, id }`
   - **archive**: `ArchiveEntity`, `UnarchiveEntity`
+  - **clipboard**: `Cut`, `Copy`, `Paste` (wraps `PasteMatrix`; preserves drag-vs-paste)
+  - **search**: `Search { query, type? }` (wraps `EntitySearchIndex`)
 - `service.rs` ‚Äî bootstrap `host.expose_rust_module("entity", EntityServer::new(...))`

 Writes go through `EntityContext`, which already pushes onto the shared `StoreContext` (undoable) and broadcasts `EntityEvent`s ‚Äî so undo + the notification surface work for free. Share the SAME `Arc<StoreContext>` as `kanban`/`views`/`store`.
